title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Cencora Limited
body: "Application number 5351  Applicant Cencora, Inc. objected to the name used by Cencora Limited under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 10 September 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Cencora Limited is changed to 15337329, Ltd. "
